usage_note: Used in social commentary to anchor a concrete issue in education or consumption.

mandarin_意义: 人与人之间建立和维持关系的交往活动。
example_sentence: 青少年社交方式的变化，也影响了他们的消费选择。
example_sentence_en: Changes in teenagers' social habits have also affected their consumption choices.
usage_note: Used in social commentary to anchor a concrete issue in education or consumption.

mandarin_意义: 起决定性作用的力量或地位。
example_sentence: 在这类消费趋势中，年轻人正逐渐成为主导力量。
example_sentence_en: In this consumption trend, young people are gradually becoming the leading force.
usage_note: Used in social commentary to anchor a concrete issue in education or consumption.

mandarin_意义: 非常小，不值得特别提及。
example_sentence: 评论指出，一些家庭在育儿方式上出现了微不足道的倾向，需要及时调整节奏。
example_sentence_en: The commentary points out that some families show a tendency toward 微不足道 in parenting and need to adjust in time.
usage_note: Useful in editorials to characterize recurring social or parenting patterns succinctly.

mandarin_意义: 让人放松和获得快乐的活动。
example_sentence: 周末娱乐开支上升，反映出城市居民消费结构的变化。
example_sentence_en: Rising weekend entertainment spending reflects shifts in urban consumption structure.
usage_note: Used in social commentary to anchor a concrete issue in education or consumption.

mandarin_意义: 系统记录知识或思想的图书。
example_sentence: 这家书店把人文社科书籍摆在最显眼的位置。
example_sentence_en: This bookstore places humanities and social science books in the most visible spot.
usage_note: Used in social commentary to anchor a concrete issue in education or consumption.

mandarin_意义: 符合当前流行趋势。
example_sentence: 社论认为，家长的消费选择如果过于时尚，反而可能给孩子带来额外压力。
example_sentence_en: The editorial argues that if parents' spending choices become too 时尚, children may face extra pressure.
usage_note: Used to evaluate attitudes or tendencies in opinion pieces about parenting and society.

mandarin_意义: 具有与众不同的独特风格。
example_sentence: 评论指出，一些家庭在育儿方式上出现了别具一格的倾向，需要及时调整节奏。
example_sentence_en: The commentary points out that some families show a tendency toward 别具一格 in parenting and need to adjust in time.
usage_note: Useful in editorials to characterize recurring social or parenting patterns succinctly.

mandarin_意义: 在表达、设计或行为上的稳定特色。
example_sentence: 她的写作风格简洁有力，很适合报刊评论。
example_sentence_en: Her writing style is concise and forceful, well suited to newspaper commentary.
usage_note: Used in social commentary to anchor a concrete issue in education or consumption.

mandarin_意义: 缺乏充分考虑而迅速行动。
example_sentence: 社论认为，家长的消费选择如果过于冲动，反而可能给孩子带来额外压力。
example_sentence_en: The editorial argues that if parents' spending choices become too 冲动, children may face extra pressure.
usage_note: Used to evaluate attitudes or tendencies in opinion pieces about parenting and society.

mandarin_意义: 将收入中暂不使用的部分存起来。
example_sentence: 调查显示，居民储蓄意愿上升，消费更趋谨慎。
example_sentence_en: Surveys show rising savings willingness among residents and more cautious spending.
usage_note: Used in social commentary to anchor a concrete issue in education or consumption.

mandarin_意义: 收入与支出的整体情况。
example_sentence: 不少家庭开始用记账软件管理每月收支。
example_sentence_en: Many households now use budgeting apps to manage monthly income and expenses.
usage_note: Used in social commentary to anchor a concrete issue in education or consumption.

mandarin_意义: 学习的功课。
example_sentence: 希望你能在新的学期里学业进步。
example_sentence_en: I hope you make progress in your studies in the new semester.
usage_note: Education path.

mandarin_意义: 认为某事物重要并给予重视。
英文意义: to regard as important, to value
example_sentence: 报道把看重这件事放进家庭教育场景里讨论，提醒家长别被焦虑牵着做决定。
example_sentence_en: The report discusses 看重 within family-education scenarios and reminds parents not to let anxiety drive their decisions.
usage_note: Often appears in reported actions or decisions in parenting and consumer-behavior writing.

mandarin_意义: 把目标明确地指向某对象。
example_sentence: 报道把针对这件事放进家庭教育场景里讨论，提醒家长别被焦虑牵着做决定。
example_sentence_en: The report discusses 针对 within family-education scenarios and reminds parents not to let anxiety drive their decisions.
usage_note: Often appears in reported actions or decisions in parenting and consumer-behavior writing.

mandarin_意义: 按照顺序一个接一个地进行。
example_sentence: 入场时请大家依次排队，不要拥挤。
example_sentence_en: Please line up in order when entering and avoid crowding.
usage_note: Common in formal writing, discussion, and news-style contexts.

mandarin_意义: 某种数量关系的比例指标。
example_sentence: 今年高校毕业生就业率稳中有升。
example_sentence_en: This year the employment rate for college graduates has risen steadily.
usage_note: Used in social commentary to anchor a concrete issue in education or consumption.

mandarin_意义: 按从大到小或从后往前的顺序数。
example_sentence: 报道把倒数这件事放进家庭教育场景里讨论，提醒家长别被焦虑牵着做决定。
example_sentence_en: The report discusses 倒数 within family-education scenarios and reminds parents not to let anxiety drive their decisions.
usage_note: Often appears in reported actions or decisions in parenting and consumer-behavior writing.

mandarin_意义: 对前文内容进行总体归纳并给出结论。
搭配: ～，我们认为；～可以看出；～问题不大
example_sentence: 总的来说，今年上半年的就业形势比预期稳定。
example_sentence_en: In general, the employment situation in the first half of this year was more stable than expected.
usage_note: Used to summarize and conclude a point in essays and reports.

mandarin_意义: 通过手机发送的简短文字信息。
example_sentence: 暴雨预警发布后，社区工作人员第一时间群发短信提醒居民减少外出。
example_sentence_en: After the rainstorm alert was issued, community staff immediately sent group text messages reminding residents to stay indoors.
usage_note: Common in daily communication and public notices.
common_errors: 口语中常与“消息”混用，正式语境宜区分信息类型。

mandarin_意义: 正餐以外少量食用的食品。
example_sentence: 营养师建议学生少吃高糖零食，把水果和坚果当作加餐。
example_sentence_en: Nutritionists advise students to reduce sugary snacks and choose fruit and nuts as extra meals.
usage_note: Usually contrasts with regular meals in health contexts.
common_errors: 不宜把“零食”当作三餐替代品来表达。

mandarin_意义: 按日常作息正式进食的一餐。
英文意义: regular meal (as opposed to snacks, etc.)
example_sentence: 长期不吃正餐只靠外卖奶茶充饥，会明显影响学习状态。
example_sentence_en: Relying on milk tea and skipping proper meals for a long time clearly affects study performance.
usage_note: Used in discussions on nutrition and routines.
common_errors: 常误写成“正歺”，注意字形。

mandarin_意义: 用公告或询问等方式收集（作品、意见等）。
example_sentence: 杂志社正在征集散文，他投了一篇回忆母亲的文章。
example_sentence_en: The magazine is soliciting essays, and he submitted one about his mother.
usage_note: Common in publishing.

mandarin_意义: 接受邀请并按约参加某项活动。
example_sentence: 知名作家应邀到校园讲座，分享了她的写作经历。
example_sentence_en: The well-known writer attended the campus lecture by invitation and shared her writing experience.
usage_note: Formal written word often seen in news reports.
common_errors: 后面通常接活动或场合，不直接接人称宾语。

mandarin_意义: 在比赛或评选中负责评审的人。
英文意义: name of judge or evaluation committee member
example_sentence: 决赛现场，评委围绕创意和可行性给出了细致点评。
example_sentence_en: At the finals, the judges gave detailed comments on creativity and feasibility.
usage_note: Common in competitions and talent shows.
common_errors: “评委”是集合称谓，不等于“评审委员会”。

mandarin_意义: 形容发展迅速、生命力旺盛。
example_sentence: 近几年县域文旅产业蓬勃发展，带动了周边就业。
example_sentence_en: In recent years, county cultural tourism has flourished and created jobs nearby.
usage_note: Usually describes growth momentum.
common_errors: 一般不用于消极对象。

mandarin_意义: 负责组织并承办某项活动。
example_sentence: 本次青年论坛由市图书馆主办，吸引了不少中学生参加。
example_sentence_en: This youth forum was hosted by the city library and attracted many middle school students.
usage_note: Used in event announcements and posters.
common_errors: 与“承办”分工不同，“主办”通常负责统筹。

mandarin_意义: 报刊或图书编辑工作的主要负责人。
example_sentence: 新刊发刊词由主编执笔，强调了报道的公共责任。
example_sentence_en: The launch editorial was written by the chief editor, emphasizing public responsibility in reporting.
usage_note: Title used in publishing and media.
common_errors: 不要和“责编”混为一谈。

mandarin_意义: 文学创作与评论活动的整体圈子。
example_sentence: 这部小说出版后在文坛引发热议，评论两极分化明显。
example_sentence_en: After publication, the novel sparked debate in literary circles, with clearly polarized reviews.
usage_note: Formal word for literary community.
common_errors: 多用于书面表达，口语中较少说。

mandarin_意义: 表示紧接着发生，没有明显间隔。
example_sentence: 记者提问后，发言人随即作出回应，澄清了误读。
example_sentence_en: After the reporter’s question, the spokesperson responded immediately and clarified the misunderstanding.
usage_note: Connects consecutive actions in formal narrative.
common_errors: “随即”后一般不再加“马上”。

mandarin_意义: 比喻双方在观点或立场上尖锐对立。
英文意义: a needle point against a needle point, be in sharp opposition
example_sentence: 在预算听证会上，两方代表针锋相对，争论持续了一个多小时。
example_sentence_en: At the budget hearing, the two sides confronted each other sharply for more than an hour.
usage_note: Used for intense argument or confrontation.
common_errors: 多用于双方对立场景，不用于单方批评。

mandarin_意义: 缺乏充分依据而形成的片面看法。
example_sentence: 招聘时若带着性别偏见，会直接影响选人的公平性。
example_sentence_en: If recruiters hold gender bias, it directly harms fairness in hiring.
usage_note: Often appears in social issue discussions.
common_errors: 与“成见”接近，但“偏见”贬义更强。

mandarin_意义: 对概念内涵与外延作出的界定。
example_sentence: 报告先定义了“有效学习”，再比较不同教学法的效果。
example_sentence_en: The report first defined “effective learning,” then compared the impact of different teaching methods.
usage_note: Can be a noun or verb in academic contexts.
common_errors: 作动词时常说“定义为……”。

mandarin_意义: 开玩笑；戏弄。
example_sentence: 朋友调侃他孝顺，他笑着点头。
example_sentence_en: Friends teased him about being filial; he nodded with a smile.
usage_note: Light humor.

mandarin_意义: 言谈或表达中带有机智风趣的意味。
example_sentence: 这篇专栏以幽默笔调讨论教育焦虑，读者反响很好。
example_sentence_en: The column discussed education anxiety in a humorous tone and received great feedback.
usage_note: Can describe style, personality, or expression.
common_errors: “幽默”不等于“搞笑”，语气通常更克制。

mandarin_意义: 令人发笑，多带夸张或可笑意味。
example_sentence: 他在舞台上故意做出滑稽动作，逗得观众前仰后合。
example_sentence_en: He deliberately made comic movements on stage, making the audience burst into laughter.
usage_note: Often describes comic effect with exaggeration.
common_errors: 语义不如“幽默”文雅，正式文体慎用。

mandarin_意义: 就某一问题进行较深入的讨论研究。
example_sentence: 专家会上，学者围绕老龄化议题进行了深入探讨。
example_sentence_en: At the forum, scholars conducted in-depth discussions on aging issues.
usage_note: Formal verb in academic and policy contexts.
common_errors: 常误作“探讨到”，应说“探讨某问题”。

mandarin_意义: 心理状态。
example_sentence: 面对困难，保持一个积极乐观的心态很重要。
example_sentence_en: When facing difficulties, maintaining a positive and optimistic mindset is important.
usage_note: State of mind.

mandarin_意义: 用某种立场或角度去认识、评价。
英文意义: to look upon, to regard as
example_sentence: 对网络热搜要理性看待，不能只凭标题下结论。
example_sentence_en: Trending topics online should be viewed rationally rather than judged by headlines alone.
usage_note: Usually takes abstract objects such as issues or phenomena.
common_errors: 后面常接“问题/现象”，不接具体实物。

mandarin_意义: 用肩膀承担重量，也比喻承担压力。
example_sentence: 项目最困难那段时间，组长一个人扛下了大部分协调工作。
example_sentence_en: During the hardest stage of the project, the team lead took on most of the coordination work alone.
usage_note: Has both literal and metaphorical use.
common_errors: 书面语中“承担”更正式。

mandarin_意义: 供人上下攀登的器具。
example_sentence: 消防员扶稳梯子后，迅速将被困住户转移到安全地带。
example_sentence_en: After steadying the ladder, firefighters quickly moved trapped residents to safety.
usage_note: Concrete noun frequently used in safety contexts.
common_errors: 比喻用法需结合语境，如“成长的梯子”。

mandarin_意义: 向上走或攀上某处，也可指刊登。
英文意义: to ascend, to mount (usually by foot)
example_sentence: 这篇调查报道明天将登在头版，引起了广泛关注。
example_sentence_en: This investigative report will appear on tomorrow’s front page and has drawn wide attention.
usage_note: Polysemous verb with climbing and publishing senses.
common_errors: “登录”与“登”意义不同，勿混用。

mandarin_意义: 对人或事物发表看法并进行评价。
example_sentence: 社论评论指出，政策落地还需要更透明的执行细则。
example_sentence_en: The editorial comment noted that policy implementation still needs clearer and more transparent rules.
usage_note: Can be verb or noun in media context.
common_errors: “评价”偏中性，“评论”更强调表达观点。

mandarin_意义: 借故事寄托道理的文学体裁。
example_sentence: 老师用一则寓言引出主题，让学生更容易理解抽象概念。
example_sentence_en: The teacher introduced the topic with a fable, making abstract ideas easier to understand.
usage_note: Often used in language and moral education.
common_errors: “寓言”重点在“寓意”，不等于普通故事。

mandarin_意义: 内容精练、含有劝诫或经验的短句。
example_sentence: 他把“今日事今日毕”当作格言，做事一向很有条理。
example_sentence_en: He treats “Do today’s work today” as a maxim and works in an orderly way.
usage_note: Short aphoristic expression with moral lesson.
common_errors: 与“名言”接近，但“格言”更重劝诫性。

mandarin_意义: 精细巧妙，构思或做工讲究。
example_sentence: 这件文创产品结构精巧，折叠后只占半本书大小。
example_sentence_en: This cultural product has an ingenious structure and folds to about half a book in size.
usage_note: Often praises design or craftsmanship.
common_errors: 可修饰“构思/做工”，较少修饰抽象情绪。

mandarin_意义: 通过鼓舞或奖励使人更有动力。
example_sentence: 学校设立阅读奖章制度，持续激励学生养成读书习惯。
example_sentence_en: The school set up reading badges to continuously motivate students to build reading habits.
usage_note: Used in education and management contexts.
common_errors: “激励”偏积极推动，不用于单纯安慰。

mandarin_意义: 称赞并认为值得肯定。
example_sentence: 这套无障碍改造方案因细节周到而受到居民称道。
example_sentence_en: This accessibility renovation plan was widely praised by residents for its thoughtful details.
usage_note: Formal verb for praise.
common_errors: 常与“受到/值得”搭配，较少单独口语使用。

mandarin_意义: 作品中事件发展的过程和安排。
example_sentence: 这部剧前半段节奏平缓，但后续情节推进非常紧凑。
example_sentence_en: The first half of the drama was slow, but the later plot development became very compact.
usage_note: Used in literary and film criticism.
common_errors: 不要与“细节”完全等同。

mandarin_意义: 心里老想着，多含关心或牵念。
英文意义: to remember with concern, to keep thinking about
example_sentence: 外地求学的女儿总惦记着爷爷的身体，每周都打电话。
example_sentence_en: Studying away from home, the daughter keeps worrying about her grandfather and calls every week.
usage_note: Colloquial and emotional.
common_errors: 对象多是人或未完成的事，不用于抽象理论。

mandarin_意义: 喜欢新的、厌弃旧的，常指态度不专一。
英文意义: to love the new and loathe the old (esp. with regards to love)
example_sentence: 消费升级并不等于喜新厌旧，很多人仍愿意长期使用耐用品。
example_sentence_en: Consumption upgrading does not necessarily mean fickleness; many people still prefer durable goods for long-term use.
usage_note: Often criticizes unstable preference or loyalty.
common_errors: 多用于评价倾向，不宜滥用于所有“更新换代”。

mandarin_意义: 记者为报道而访问相关人员并采集信息。
example_sentence: 记者连续三天在工地采访，记录了夜班工人的真实生活。
example_sentence_en: The reporter spent three days interviewing at the construction site, documenting night-shift workers’ lives.
usage_note: Can be both verb and noun in journalism.
common_errors: “访问”范围更广，“采访”更偏媒体语境。

mandarin_意义: 把希望寄托在某人或某事上。
example_sentence: 临考前才突击复习，指望拿高分并不现实。
example_sentence_en: Cramming right before exams and expecting high scores is unrealistic.
usage_note: Often appears in realistic or cautionary tone.
common_errors: 后面常接人或办法，不接“将来”这类抽象时间词。

mandarin_意义: 新产品、作品等公开发布并进入公众视野。
英文意义: (of products works) to face the world, to appear on the market
example_sentence: 历时五年整理的地方志终于面世，填补了区域研究空白。
example_sentence_en: The local chronicle compiled over five years was finally published, filling a gap in regional studies.
usage_note: Formal term for public release.
common_errors: 主语通常是作品、产品，不是自然人。

mandarin_意义: 形容非常像某种样子，带有明显的神态或气势。
example_sentence: 他穿上工作服后俨然一位老技师，动作干净利落。
example_sentence_en: Once he put on the work uniform, he looked just like a veteran technician, moving neatly and efficiently.
usage_note: Used to depict appearance or demeanor vividly.
common_errors: 后面多接名词性结构，不直接接动词短语。

mandarin_意义: 人们最关注、争论最集中的问题。
example_sentence: 租房市场监管力度是否足够，成了本次民生访谈的焦点。
example_sentence_en: Whether rental market regulation is sufficient became the focus of this livelihood interview.
usage_note: Widely used in media and policy discussion.
common_errors: “重点”偏任务安排，“焦点”偏关注中心。

mandarin_意义: 以说讲方式表演历史或故事的传统曲艺。
example_sentence: 博物馆周末开设评书专场，让年轻观众接触传统口头艺术。
example_sentence_en: The museum held a storytelling performance on weekends to expose young audiences to traditional oral arts.
usage_note: Traditional Chinese narrative performance art.
common_errors: 不要和“评论书籍”的“评书”字面误解。

mandarin_意义: 放心不下，心里一直惦念。
example_sentence: 她出差在外，最牵挂的还是刚上小学的孩子。
example_sentence_en: While on business trips, she worries most about her child who just started primary school.
usage_note: Expresses emotional concern.
common_errors: 与“牵连”意义不同，不可混写。

mandarin_意义: 内容丰富而不空泛，也可指使内容变得更丰富。
example_sentence: 他把通勤时间用来听课，日程紧凑却过得很充实。
example_sentence_en: He uses commuting time for courses, so his schedule is tight but fulfilling.
usage_note: Common for describing life quality and content richness.
common_errors: “充实”不等于“忙碌”，语义更积极。

mandarin_意义: 非常优秀，超出一般。
example_sentence: 他在医学研究方面取得了卓越的成就。
example_sentence_en: He has achieved outstanding results in medical research.
usage_note: Exceptional quality.

mandarin_意义: 在实践中形成的有效方法和手段。
example_sentence: 老师示范了三种答题技巧，学生当场练习后提升明显。
example_sentence_en: The teacher demonstrated three test-taking techniques, and students improved noticeably after practice.
usage_note: Practical method learned through training.
common_errors: 与“技术”不同，“技巧”更偏方法层面。

mandarin_意义: 差别；不同的地方。
example_sentence: 两种面料的差异主要体现在透气性和手感上。
example_sentence_en: The difference between the two fabrics lies mainly in breathability and feel.
usage_note: Formal noun.

mandarin_意义: 处于青春期的年轻女性。
example_sentence: 小说以一名乡镇少女的成长经历，折射了家庭教育变化。
example_sentence_en: The novel uses a rural teenage girl’s growth to reflect changes in family education.
usage_note: Neutral term in narrative writing.
common_errors: 新闻写作中注意避免标签化使用。

mandarin_意义: 殷切地希望某事发生或某人到来。
example_sentence: 村民盼了多年的通村公路终于通车，出行方便了很多。
example_sentence_en: The long-awaited village road finally opened, greatly improving transportation for residents.
usage_note: Conveys strong expectation with emotion.
common_errors: 常与“着”连用表达持续状态。

mandarin_意义: 公历新年的第一天，即一月一日。
example_sentence: 元旦假期前，铁路部门加开列车满足返乡需求。
example_sentence_en: Before the New Year holiday, rail authorities added trains to meet return-home demand.
usage_note: Fixed-date holiday in official calendar.
common_errors: 不要与“春节”混同。

mandarin_意义: 心里，内心深处。
example_sentence: 听到录取消息那一刻，她心头的大石头终于落了地。
example_sentence_en: At the moment she heard the admission news, the weight on her heart was finally lifted.
usage_note: Literary expression for inner feelings.
common_errors: 多用于固定搭配，不单独作主语。

mandarin_意义: 界限分明、完全不同地。
example_sentence: 两位作者对同一事件的解读截然不同，读者评价也明显分化。
example_sentence_en: The two authors interpreted the same event in completely different ways, and reader responses split sharply.
usage_note: Almost always used with “不同/相反”.
common_errors: 不单独用作状语，常见搭配是“截然不同”。

mandarin_意义: 研究天体运行和宇宙现象的学科。
example_sentence: 学校开设天文社团后，越来越多学生开始记录月相变化。
example_sentence_en: After the school opened an astronomy club, more students began recording lunar phases.
usage_note: Academic discipline term.
common_errors: “天文数字”是引申义，需按语境区分。

mandarin_意义: 中国普通高等学校招生全国统一考试。
example_sentence: 高考改革后，学校更重视综合素质和长期学习能力。
example_sentence_en: After reform of the college entrance exam, schools place greater emphasis on holistic quality and long-term learning ability.
usage_note: Core term in Chinese education context.
common_errors: 常与“中考”混淆，层级不同。

mandarin_意义: 关闭或限制对外开放，也可形容不开放。
example_sentence: 受施工影响，主干道将封闭三天，交警已发布绕行方案。
example_sentence_en: Due to construction, the main road will be closed for three days, and traffic police have issued detour plans.
usage_note: Used both for physical closure and abstract openness.
common_errors: 作形容词时常接“环境/心态”等抽象名词。

mandarin_意义: 用力压缩空间，也指在拥挤环境中勉强进入。
example_sentence: 早高峰地铁太挤，不少上班族选择错峰出行。
example_sentence_en: The subway is too crowded during rush hour, so many commuters choose off-peak travel.
usage_note: Has literal and figurative uses (e.g., squeeze time).
common_errors: “拥挤”是形容词，“挤”多作动词。

mandarin_意义: 只有一个，独一无二。
example_sentence: 在水资源紧张地区，节水不是口号，而是唯一选择。
example_sentence_en: In water-scarce regions, water conservation is not a slogan but the only option.
usage_note: Emphasizes exclusivity.
common_errors: 与“惟一”可通用，现代汉语多写“唯一”。

mandarin_意义: 使位置或形式不再变化，也指长期稳定不变。
example_sentence: 为提高效率，编辑部把选题会固定在每周一上午。
example_sentence_en: To improve efficiency, the editorial office fixed topic meetings to Monday mornings each week.
usage_note: Used in management, engineering, and daily scheduling.
common_errors: “稳定”偏状态，“固定”可表示动作。

mandarin_意义: 对题目进行分析并求得答案。
英文意义: to answer a problem, to complete an exercise
example_sentence: 老师强调先读懂题干再解题，能减少很多低级错误。
example_sentence_en: The teacher stressed understanding the prompt before solving, which reduces many basic mistakes.
usage_note: Education term for problem-solving process.
common_errors: “题”前通常不加量词，如不说“解一个题目题”。

mandarin_意义: 双方或多方之间相互交流并产生影响。
example_sentence: 直播课增加了即时提问环节，师生互动明显提升。
example_sentence_en: Live classes added real-time Q&A sessions, significantly improving teacher-student interaction.
usage_note: Common in education, media, and product design.
common_errors: 作名词时常说“有互动”，作动词时说“和…互动”。

mandarin_意义: 教材、课程或系统中相对独立的组成部分。
example_sentence: 这套教材每个单元都配有阅读、听力和写作任务。
example_sentence_en: Each unit in this textbook includes reading, listening, and writing tasks.
usage_note: Used for modular structures in education and architecture.
common_errors: “单位”与“单元”意义不同。

mandarin_意义: 面向听众系统表达观点的讲话。
英文意义: to make a speech, to give a talk
example_sentence: 毕业典礼上，她的演讲围绕“慢成长”主题，打动了不少同学。
example_sentence_en: At the graduation ceremony, her speech on “slow growth” moved many classmates.
usage_note: Can be both act and speech text.
common_errors: “演说”更书面，“演讲”更常用。

mandarin_意义: 演示文稿中一页一页展示的内容页面。
example_sentence: 发布会上，主讲人用一张幻灯片清楚对比了新旧方案。
example_sentence_en: At the presentation, the speaker used one slide to clearly compare the old and new plans.
usage_note: Modern usage often overlaps with PPT page.
common_errors: 口语可说“PPT”，书面可用“幻灯片”。

mandarin_意义: 形容说话或做事条理清楚、理由充分。
example_sentence: 他第一次主持读书会就讲得头头是道，逻辑非常清晰。
example_sentence_en: Even at his first book club session, he spoke with clear logic and persuasive structure.
usage_note: Praises organized and convincing expression.
common_errors: 多用于说话表达，不常用于静态名词。

mandarin_意义: 心里发慌，感到害怕或发虚。
英文意义: to feel timid, to be afraid
example_sentence: 他平时准备得不错，可一到公开发言还是有点发怵。
example_sentence_en: He prepares well, but still feels nervous when speaking in public.
usage_note: Colloquial term for nervous fear.
common_errors: 较口语化，正式写作可用“紧张/畏惧”。

mandarin_意义: 彼此说话交流意见。
example_sentence: 调研中，记者与摊主交谈了近一小时，了解了成本压力。
example_sentence_en: During the investigation, the reporter talked with stall owners for nearly an hour to understand cost pressures.
usage_note: Neutral formal alternative to “聊天”.
common_errors: 后面常接“与/跟某人”，注意介词搭配。

mandarin_意义: 逐步形成可见的结构或样态。
example_sentence: 经过多轮讨论，社区改造方案终于成形并进入公示阶段。
example_sentence_en: After several rounds of discussion, the community renovation plan finally took shape and entered public review.
usage_note: Used for processes where ideas become concrete.
common_errors: 与“成型”通用，但行业写作可按规范区分。

mandarin_意义: 思考问题和处理问题的线索与方向。
example_sentence: 这篇评论先摆事实再讲道理，写作思路非常清楚。
example_sentence_en: The commentary presents facts first and reasoning next, with a very clear line of thought.
usage_note: Common in study and work method discussions.
common_errors: 常与“想法”混用，“思路”更强调路径。

mandarin_意义: 正好合适，分寸得体。
example_sentence: 发言人用词恰当，既回应了质疑，也避免了情绪对立。
example_sentence_en: The spokesperson used appropriate wording, addressing doubts while avoiding emotional confrontation.
usage_note: Highlights appropriateness and balance.
common_errors: 常与“的”连用修饰名词，如“恰当的方式”。

mandarin_意义: 速度很快。
example_sentence: 快速交通缩短了距离，也压缩了时间感。
example_sentence_en: Fast transport shortens distance but compresses one's sense of time.
usage_note: Modern keyword.

mandarin_意义: 把时间、精力或资金放进某项工作。
example_sentence: 公司决定继续投入研发，以保持在新能源赛道的竞争力。
example_sentence_en: The company decided to continue investing in R&D to remain competitive in new energy.
usage_note: Can denote investment behavior or focused state.
common_errors: 作形容词时多说“很投入”。

mandarin_意义: 自由；不受拘束。
example_sentence: 他在家里很自在，像回到童年。
example_sentence_en: At home he is at ease, as if back in childhood.
usage_note: Comfort state.

mandarin_意义: 表示归根到底，强调不可忽视的事实。
example_sentence: 争论可以有，但毕竟大家的目标都是把事情做好。
example_sentence_en: Disagreements are possible, but after all everyone shares the goal of doing the job well.
usage_note: Used to reinforce a final reason or fact.
common_errors: 通常放在分句前，不与“就”机械连用。

mandarin_意义: 物体的重量，也比喻重要程度。
example_sentence: 这份调研报告数据扎实，在政策讨论中很有分量。
example_sentence_en: This research report is data-driven and carries considerable weight in policy discussions.
usage_note: Literal and metaphorical senses both common.
common_errors: 口语中的“份量”多为异体写法，规范写“分量”。

mandarin_意义: 按标准划分出的层次级别。
example_sentence: 新规对食品安全等级作了更细的划分，监管更有针对性。
example_sentence_en: The new regulation refined food safety grading, making supervision more targeted.
usage_note: Used in standards, systems, and regulation.
common_errors: “级别”偏口语，“等级”更制度化。

mandarin_意义: 按先后顺序依次站立或办理。
example_sentence: 新店开业当天，门口一早就有人排队等候。
example_sentence_en: On opening day, people lined up early in front of the new store.
usage_note: Everyday verb; not an idiom.
common_errors: 作动词短语使用，不标注为“成语”。

mandarin_意义: 亲身感受并体会其中意味。
example_sentence: 游客在古镇慢行，领略了传统街巷的生活气息。
example_sentence_en: Walking slowly through the old town, visitors experienced the charm of traditional streets.
usage_note: Often paired with scenery, culture, or style.
common_errors: 宾语多为可感知的风格或景象。

mandarin_意义: 冷酷严厉，给人带来痛苦。
example_sentence: 行业竞争日趋残酷，中小企业不得不加快转型。
example_sentence_en: Competition in the industry has become harsh, forcing small and medium firms to transform faster.
usage_note: Strong negative adjective.
common_errors: 语气较重，不宜轻描淡写使用。

mandarin_意义: 使人对后续结果产生期待和不确定感。
example_sentence: 导演在片尾故意留下悬念，为续集埋下伏笔。
example_sentence_en: The director deliberately left suspense at the end, setting up the sequel.
usage_note: Common in storytelling and media narration.
common_errors: “悬疑”是风格类型，“悬念”是叙事效果。

mandarin_意义: 两个相反或差距很大的端点。
example_sentence: 对这项新政策的公众态度出现两极：支持者看重效率，反对者担忧公平。
example_sentence_en: Public attitudes toward the new policy split into two extremes: supporters value efficiency, while opponents worry about fairness.
usage_note: Often used in social analysis and opinion trends.
common_errors: 常与“分化”连用更自然。

mandarin_意义: 由原来相对一致转向分成不同部分。
example_sentence: 随着政策细则公布，原本统一的舆论逐渐分化。
example_sentence_en: As policy details were released, previously unified public opinion gradually split.
usage_note: Used for divergence in groups, opinions, or markets.
common_errors: 与“分裂”相比语气较中性。

mandarin_意义: 要求高、标准紧，不宽松。
example_sentence: 这位老师对论文格式要求很严，但学生普遍认可这种训练。
example_sentence_en: The teacher is strict about paper formatting, but students generally appreciate the training.
usage_note: Often used in educational and management settings.
common_errors: 口语里常说“很严格”，单说“很严”偏简略。

mandarin_意义: 因不顺心而感到忧愁，也可指忧愁的事。
example_sentence: 升学选择成了不少家庭的共同烦恼。
example_sentence_en: School placement choices have become a shared concern for many families.
usage_note: Can be noun (worry) or verb-like expression.
common_errors: “烦脑”为误写，应为“烦恼”。

mandarin_意义: 从属于主体而存在，不具独立地位。
example_sentence: 医院附属康复中心下月启用，将分担主院区压力。
example_sentence_en: The hospital’s affiliated rehabilitation center will open next month to ease pressure on the main campus.
usage_note: Formal term in institutions and organizational structures.
common_errors: “附属”强调隶属关系，不等于“附加”。

mandarin_意义: 基础牢固，做事稳当可靠。
example_sentence: 这支队伍前期调研很扎实，方案落地速度明显更快。
example_sentence_en: This team did very solid early research, so their plan was implemented much faster.
usage_note: Positive adjective for foundation and work quality.
common_errors: 常与“基础/功底”搭配，表达更自然。

mandarin_意义: 智力商数。
example_sentence: 虽然他的智商很高，但学习并不努力。
example_sentence_en: Although his IQ is high, he doesn't work hard at studying.
usage_note: Mental metric.

mandarin_意义: 让不同的人或环节配合得顺。
搭配: 协调资源；协调时间；沟通协调
example_sentence: 项目快上线那周，她天天在各组之间协调，硬是把进度拉齐了。
example_sentence_en: The week before launch, she spent every day coordinating between teams and managed to pull the schedule together.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 一个人的修养和情绪控制能力。
搭配: 个人涵养；言语有涵养；提高涵养
example_sentence: 被客户当面怼了他也没急眼，这份涵养真不容易。
example_sentence_en: Even when a client confronted him to his face, he didn't lose his temper—that kind of self-restraint is hard to come by.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 刚好处在某个时间点或阶段。
搭配: 正值高峰期；正值毕业季；正值雨季
example_sentence: 我们去看展那天正值周末，门口排队排老长。
example_sentence_en: The day we went to the exhibition happened to fall on a weekend, and the line at the entrance stretched forever.
usage_note: 常接时间词，后面多跟“时期/季节/阶段”。

mandarin_意义: 指当年毕业、刚进入求职市场的。
搭配: 应届毕业生；应届身份；应届求职
example_sentence: 她是应届生，但做事一点不慌，沟通特别清楚。
example_sentence_en: She is a fresh graduate, but she stays calm at work and communicates very clearly.
usage_note: 多用于招聘语境，常说“应届生”。
common_errors: 别和“往届”混用；应届看毕业年份。

mandarin_意义: 在社会上不断传播开来。
搭配: 广为流传；民间流传；流传已久
example_sentence: 这段采访剪辑在网上流传很快，第二天全组都看过了。
example_sentence_en: The interview clip spread quickly online, and the whole team had watched it by the next day.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 到了现场或关键时刻的即时发挥。
英文意义: to be personally on the scene
搭配: 临场发挥；临场反应；临场应变
example_sentence: 他平时话不多，临场发言反而最稳。
example_sentence_en: He is usually quiet, but his on-the-spot speeches are the steadiest.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。
common_errors: 常见错写“临厂”；注意是“场”。

mandarin_意义: 表现特别好，明显高于一般水平。
搭配: 表现出色；完成得出色；发挥出色
example_sentence: 这次汇报她讲得很出色，连最挑剔的老师都点头了。
example_sentence_en: She gave an outstanding presentation, and even the most demanding teacher nodded in approval.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 事情刚好碰上，带点偶然。
搭配: 真凑巧；凑巧碰上；纯属凑巧
example_sentence: 本来想改签，结果凑巧赶上最后一班地铁。
example_sentence_en: I was going to change my ticket, but by chance I caught the last subway.
usage_note: 口语常用，表达“刚好碰上”。

mandarin_意义: 单位里负责人员管理和招聘的事务。
搭配: 人事部门；人事调整；人事流程
example_sentence: 你先把材料给人事，流程走完再签正式合同。
example_sentence_en: Submit your materials to HR first; sign the formal contract after the process is complete.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 用手扶着别人走，防止摔倒。
英文意义: to support sb. with one's hand
搭配: 互相搀扶；上楼搀扶；搀扶老人
example_sentence: 雨天路滑，大家一路搀扶着老人慢慢过马路。
example_sentence_en: The road was slippery in the rain, and everyone helped the elderly cross the street step by step.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 介绍个人经历和能力的求职材料。
搭配: 投简历；简历筛选；更新简历
example_sentence: 他把简历改了三版，终于拿到心仪岗位的面试。
example_sentence_en: He revised his resume three times and finally got an interview for the job he wanted.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 成绩或表现非常突出。
搭配: 成绩优异；表现优异；能力优异
example_sentence: 她这学期成绩很优异，但还是照样每天复盘。
example_sentence_en: Her grades this semester were excellent, yet she still reviewed her work every day.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 失去平衡突然摔倒。
搭配: 栽跟头；一下栽倒；差点栽了
example_sentence: 他走神看手机，一脚没踩稳差点栽下台阶。
example_sentence_en: He was distracted by his phone and nearly fell down the stairs when he missed a step.
usage_note: 口语里常见“栽了/差点栽”。
common_errors: 和“载”同音不同义，别写错字。

mandarin_意义: 人摔倒时翻的一下。
英文意义: (of people, things, etc. after losing balance) fall
搭配: 摔跟头；栽了个跟头；吃了跟头
example_sentence: 创业第一年他栽了不少跟头，后面反而做得更稳。
example_sentence_en: He took quite a few tumbles in his first year of entrepreneurship, but later ran things more steadily.
usage_note: 固定搭配“栽跟头”“摔跟头”。
common_errors: 量词常用“个”，如“栽了个跟头”。

mandarin_意义: 跟人相处和处理社会关系的方式。
英文意义: the way one conducts oneself and treats others in society
搭配: 待人处世之道；待人处世成熟；学会待人处世
example_sentence: 能力强是一回事，待人处世得体才更让人服气。
example_sentence_en: Being capable is one thing; handling yourself well with others is what really wins respect.
usage_note: 偏书面，也可用于职场建议。

mandarin_意义: 某类商品或岗位在市场上的价格和趋势。
搭配: 市场行情；就业行情；房价行情
example_sentence: 今年新能源岗位行情不错，很多公司都在抢人。
example_sentence_en: Job prospects in new energy are strong this year, and many companies are competing for talent.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 通过测试或计算把数据定下来。
搭配: 测定数据；测定含量；测定结果
example_sentence: 实验室先把样品温度测定清楚，再继续下一步。
example_sentence_en: The lab measured the sample temperature carefully before moving on to the next step.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 对同一件事的解释或观点。
搭配: 一种说法；官方说法；不同说法
example_sentence: 同一件事大家说法不一样，最好把证据摆出来。
example_sentence_en: People describe the same event differently, so it is best to lay out the evidence.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 气势很足、志向很大的话。
搭配: 放豪言；豪言壮语；一句豪言
example_sentence: 他年初放了句豪言：年底要把产品做到行业前三。
example_sentence_en: Early in the year he made a bold pledge: to push the product into the industry's top three by year-end.
usage_note: 可褒可贬，要看说话者是否真能做到。

mandarin_意义: 对工作负责，认真投入。
搭配: 敬业精神；非常敬业；敬业态度
example_sentence: 她生病还坚持把交接写完，真是敬业到位了。
example_sentence_en: She was sick but still finished the handover—that is real dedication.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 把能力或本事真正发挥出来。
英文意义: to give free play to (abilities, etc.)
搭配: 施展才华；施展拳脚；尽情施展
example_sentence: 新团队给了他空间，他终于能施展自己的创意。
example_sentence_en: The new team gave him room, and he could finally put his creativity to work.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 在文艺、创意或表达方面的天赋与能力。
搭配: 展现才华；很有才华；才华横溢
example_sentence: 他平时低调，一上台就把才华全亮出来了。
example_sentence_en: He is usually low-key, but once on stage he shows all his talent.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 在正式上岗前进行岗位实践。
英文意义: to practice, to have an internship
搭配: 实习经历；实习岗位；去公司实习
example_sentence: 她大三就在医院实习，真正见过一线节奏。
example_sentence_en: She interned at a hospital in her junior year and saw firsthand how the front line operates.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 因触动而发出的感叹。
搭配: 颇有感慨；感慨万千；不禁感慨
example_sentence: 翻到毕业照那一刻，大家都忍不住感慨时间太快。
example_sentence_en: When everyone flipped to the graduation photo, they couldn't help sighing that time had passed so fast.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 和人或机构发生长期接触与往来。
英文意义: to come into contact with, to have dealings with
搭配: 和客户打交道；常打交道；不太会打交道
example_sentence: 做运营天天要和数据打交道，耐心比技巧更重要。
example_sentence_en: In operations you deal with data every day; patience matters more than tricks.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 不思考就跟着别人做。
搭配: 避免盲从；盲从权威；盲从潮流
example_sentence: 别人都报班你也别盲从，先看自己真缺啥。
example_sentence_en: Don't follow others into every training class—first figure out what you actually lack.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。
common_errors: 不是“从众”全同义，盲从更强调不思考。

mandarin_意义: 挑好之后正式确定下来。
英文意义: to choose; to designate and fix
搭配: 选定方案；选定人选；已选定
example_sentence: 我们昨晚开会把主方案选定了，今天直接开工。
example_sentence_en: We settled on the main plan at last night's meeting and started work today.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 按条件把不合适的先剔除。
英文意义: to screen, to eliminate through selection or competition
搭配: 初步筛选；筛选简历；层层筛选
example_sentence: 投递太多了，HR先按岗位要求筛选一轮。
example_sentence_en: There were too many applications, so HR screened candidates against the job requirements first.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 职位、标准或权限的层级。
搭配: 管理级别；权限级别；风险级别
example_sentence: 这个权限是管理员级别，普通账号看不到。
example_sentence_en: This permission is at administrator level; ordinary accounts cannot see it.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。
common_errors: 别和“级数”混淆，语义侧重点不同。

mandarin_意义: 被特别礼遇的重要客人。
搭配: 贵宾席；贵宾通道；接待贵宾
example_sentence: 活动开始前，志愿者先把贵宾引到休息区。
example_sentence_en: Before the event began, volunteers escorted the honored guests to the lounge.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 通过广播或媒体把声音内容播出去。
搭配: 播音主持；播音员；现场播音
example_sentence: 她学播音出身，开口就有那种很稳的节奏感。
example_sentence_en: She studied broadcasting, and when she speaks you can hear that steady rhythm.
usage_note: 常与“主持、配音”区分使用。
common_errors: “播音”是行为，“播音员”是人。

mandarin_意义: 电视和相关影像节目呈现的平台。
搭配: 登陆荧屏；荧屏形象；荧屏作品
example_sentence: 这部纪录片刚上荧屏，就在社媒上刷屏了。
example_sentence_en: This documentary just hit the screen and immediately went viral on social media.
usage_note: 多指电视内容，不等于手机屏幕。
common_errors: 别误写成“银屏”；现代多写“荧屏”。

mandarin_意义: 具体的场面和当时的氛围。
搭配: 真实情景；模拟情景；熟悉的情景
example_sentence: 老师先设了个真实情景，让我们现场练沟通。
example_sentence_en: The teacher set up a realistic scenario so we could practice communication on the spot.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 从前。
example_sentence: 以往他很少表达感情，如今学会了。
example_sentence_en: In the past he rarely expressed feelings; now he has learned.
usage_note: Past time.

mandarin_意义: 按地理或功能划分的范围。
搭配: 核心区域；重点区域；区域协同
example_sentence: 这片区域信号弱，视频会偶尔卡一下。
example_sentence_en: The signal is weak in this area, so the video occasionally freezes.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 系统或机构持续运行。
英文意义: (of organizations, institutions etc.) to be in operation, to run
搭配: 系统运转；正常运转；高效运转
example_sentence: 新系统试跑一周后，整体运转比以前顺多了。
example_sentence_en: After a week of trial runs, the new system operates more smoothly than before.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 双方优势能补上彼此短板。
搭配: 优势互补；产业互补；互补关系
example_sentence: 一个擅长技术一个擅长表达，俩人搭档特别互补。
example_sentence_en: One is strong in tech and the other in presentation—they complement each other perfectly as a pair.
usage_note: 强调双方都提供价值，不是单向依赖。

mandarin_意义: 把自己放到对方位置上思考。
搭配: 换位思考；角色换位；立场换位
example_sentence: 吵起来的时候先换位想想，很多误会其实能解开。
example_sentence_en: When arguing, try to see things from the other side; many misunderstandings can be cleared up.
usage_note: 常见搭配是“换位思考”。

mandarin_意义: 给人方向和做法的说明材料。
搭配: 操作指南；求职指南；旅行指南
example_sentence: 第一次租房别硬闯，先把避坑指南看一遍。
example_sentence_en: Don't rush into your first rental—read a pitfalls guide first.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 因为疏忽或拖延耽误正事。
英文意义: to cause delay in work or business
搭配: 粗心误事；迟到误事；别误事
example_sentence: 材料早点准备，临时抱佛脚最容易误事。
example_sentence_en: Prepare materials early; last-minute cramming is what most often causes delays.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。
common_errors: 多用于负面后果，慎用于轻松场景。

mandarin_意义: 从各处集中到一起。
搭配: 汇集资源；汇集信息；人才汇集
example_sentence: 这个平台把各地案例都汇集起来，查资料省事多了。
example_sentence_en: This platform gathers cases from many regions, which makes research much easier.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 为达成目标采取的整体安排和具体手段。
example_sentence: 这波增长策略不能只看曝光，还得搭配用户留存措施。
example_sentence_en: This growth strategy cannot focus only on exposure—it also needs retention measures.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。
common_errors: 别只当“strategy”，也可指具体 tactics。

mandarin_意义: 能提供动力或热量的资源。
搭配: 清洁能源；能源结构；能源转型
example_sentence: 这座城市在推进能源转型，公交车都在换电驱。
example_sentence_en: The city is pushing an energy transition, and buses are switching to electric drive.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 事件或叙述里最核心的角色。
搭配: 故事主角；真正主角；主角光环
example_sentence: 这篇报道里真正的主角不是企业，而是一线工人。
example_sentence_en: In this report the real protagonists are not companies but front-line workers.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 物质与氧发生反应并放热发光。
搭配: 充分燃烧；燃烧效率；正在燃烧
example_sentence: 发动机如果燃烧不充分，油耗和排放都会上去。
example_sentence_en: If the engine does not burn fuel completely, fuel consumption and emissions both rise.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 面向长周期的大方向和布局。
搭配: 国家战略；发展战略；长期战略
example_sentence: 企业定战略不能只看当季数据，要看三年以后。
example_sentence_en: When setting strategy, companies cannot look only at quarterly data—they need a three-year horizon.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。
common_errors: 和“策略”层级不同，战略更宏观。

mandarin_意义: 在空间、份额或位置上取得并保持。
搭配: 占据市场；占据优势；占据高地
example_sentence: 这款电池一上线就占据了高端市场的一大块份额。
example_sentence_en: Once this battery launched, it quickly captured a large share of the high-end market.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 把资源或可能性用到尽头。
搭配: 穷尽资源；穷尽可能；难以穷尽
example_sentence: 再强的模型也很难穷尽现实里的所有变量。
example_sentence_en: Even the strongest model can hardly exhaust every variable in real life.
usage_note: 多用于抽象对象，如“可能性、资源”。

mandarin_意义: 条件合适、用起来正好。
搭配: 气候适宜；温度适宜；条件适宜
example_sentence: 这块地温度湿度都适宜，做试验田很合适。
example_sentence_en: Temperature and humidity here are both suitable, making it a good test field.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 就在当前地点，不再转移。
搭配: 就地处理；就地取材；就地解决
example_sentence: 设备出问题先就地排查，别一上来就全盘重装。
example_sentence_en: When equipment fails, troubleshoot on site first instead of reinstalling everything at once.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。
common_errors: 不等于“原地不动”，可指就在当地处理。

mandarin_意义: 不直接发生，中间隔着环节。
搭配: 间接影响；间接证据；间接成本
example_sentence: 这次政策调整会间接影响到运输成本。
example_sentence_en: This policy adjustment will indirectly affect transportation costs.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 承受或携带一定重量和能量。
搭配: 高负载；负载能力；长期负载
example_sentence: 服务器长期高负载，响应时间明显变慢了。
example_sentence_en: Under long-term high load, server response time slows noticeably.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。
common_errors: 技术语境常作名词“负载能力”。

mandarin_意义: 能量向周围扩散传播。
搭配: 热辐射；辐射范围；辐射效应
example_sentence: 新建的交通枢纽把周边几座小城都辐射带动起来了。
example_sentence_en: The new transport hub has radiated development to several surrounding small cities.
usage_note: 科技语境指能量传播，比喻语境指带动影响。

mandarin_意义: 把各部分加在一起的结果。
搭配: 能量总和；成本总和；数据总和
example_sentence: 把各片区数据加总后，全年产量总和超了目标。
example_sentence_en: After adding data from all districts, the year's total output exceeded the target.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 数量少、质量弱，不够用。
搭配: 资源贫乏；内容贫乏；经验贫乏
example_sentence: 如果例子太少，论证会显得很贫乏。
example_sentence_en: If examples are too few, the argument will seem thin.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 单位体积或面积内的含量大小。
搭配: 人口密度；能量密度；信息密度
example_sentence: 这块材料能量密度高，同体积下更耐用。
example_sentence_en: This material has high energy density and lasts longer in the same volume.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。
common_errors: 别和“浓度”完全等同，适用对象不同。

mandarin_意义: 靠近海岸线的地区。
搭配: 沿海城市；沿海地区；沿海一带
example_sentence: 沿海城市这几年在风电上投入特别猛。
example_sentence_en: Coastal cities have invested heavily in wind power in recent years.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 四面环水的陆地。
搭配: 海上岛屿；群岛岛屿；小型岛屿
example_sentence: 这片海域岛屿多，运输路线得提前规划。
example_sentence_en: There are many islands in this sea area, so transport routes must be planned in advance.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 有目的地观察并记录数据。
英文意义: to observe and survey (astronomy, geography, weather, direction)
搭配: 气象观测；长期观测；观测站
example_sentence: 科研队连续观测了三个月，才拿到稳定数据。
example_sentence_en: The research team observed for three months before obtaining stable data.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 可开采或可利用资源的存量。
搭配: 石油储量；矿产储量；可采储量
example_sentence: 这片矿区探明储量后，开发方案才开始细化。
example_sentence_en: Development planning began only after reserves in this mining area were confirmed.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 按标准换算成另一种单位或金额。
英文意义: to convert into, to be equivalent to
搭配: 折合人民币；折合电量；折合成本
example_sentence: 这批设备一年省下的电，折合下来能省不少成本。
example_sentence_en: The electricity saved by this equipment in a year adds up to considerable cost savings.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。
common_errors: 后面通常接换算单位或金额。

mandarin_意义: 围绕某个地点的那片区域。
搭配: 沿海一带；山区一带；园区一带
example_sentence: 园区一带新开了很多实验平台，创业氛围很浓。
example_sentence_en: Many new labs have opened around the park, and the startup atmosphere is strong.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 连接空间的通道，也可比喻带状地带。
搭配: 交通走廊；产业走廊；生态走廊
example_sentence: 这里要打造绿色产业走廊，把上下游都串起来。
example_sentence_en: The plan is to build a green industry corridor linking upstream and downstream sectors.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 某方面不够、还差一点。
英文意义: to be deficient in, to be short of
搭配: 经验欠缺；准备欠缺；细节欠缺
example_sentence: 方案方向没问题，就是执行细节还欠缺一点。
example_sentence_en: The direction of the plan is sound, but execution details are still lacking.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 打成很小颗粒或彻底击破。
搭配: 粉碎处理；粉碎垃圾；彻底粉碎
example_sentence: 厨余垃圾先粉碎再处理，效率会更高。
example_sentence_en: Kitchen waste is more efficient to process if it is crushed first.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 能容纳的最大数量。
搭配: 存储容量；电池容量；处理容量
example_sentence: 这个电池容量大，满电能顶一整天外拍。
example_sentence_en: This battery has large capacity and can power a full day of outdoor shooting.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。
common_errors: 别和“储量”混用；容量是容纳上限。

mandarin_意义: 各部分联系紧密、形成整体；也指有机物相关。
搭配: 有机结合；有机农业；有机肥
example_sentence: 课程设计要和项目实践有机结合，别学完就断层。
example_sentence_en: Course design should be organically linked to project practice, not disconnected after class.
usage_note: 除化学义外，也常指“结构上紧密结合”。
common_errors: “有机”不等于“天然”，语义范围更广。

mandarin_意义: 不再使用并丢弃。
搭配: 废弃物；废弃设备；废弃厂房
example_sentence: 旧厂房废弃多年，现在改成了社区文创空间。
example_sentence_en: The old factory stood abandoned for years and has now been turned into a community cultural space.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 城市与镇区的统称。
搭配: 城镇化；城镇居民；中小城镇
example_sentence: 城镇更新不是只修路，还得补公共服务。
example_sentence_en: Urban renewal is not just about paving roads—it must also improve public services.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 在自然环境中自行生长或生存。
搭配: 野生动物；野生植物；野生环境
example_sentence: 保护区里常见野生鸟类，观测时别靠太近。
example_sentence_en: Wild birds are common in the reserve; keep your distance when observing.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 在某个情境里担任某种角色。
搭配: 充当角色；充当桥梁；充当原料
example_sentence: 在这套系统里，储能模块充当稳定器的角色。
example_sentence_en: In this system, the storage module acts as a stabilizer.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 把人或货物从一地运到另一地。
搭配: 铁路运输；运输成本；长途运输
example_sentence: 大件设备运输前得先做路线勘查，不然很容易卡住。
example_sentence_en: Large equipment must be route-surveyed before transport, or it easily gets stuck.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 并不是，用来否定判断。
搭配: 并非如此；并非偶然；并非所有
example_sentence: 成本上升并非坏事，很多时候是在为长期升级买单。
example_sentence_en: Rising costs are not always bad—often they pay for long-term upgrades.
usage_note: 语气比“不是”更郑重，常用于书面。
common_errors: 常与“都/完全”搭配，语气更完整。

mandarin_意义: 根据现有信息做大致计算。
搭配: 估算成本；估算规模；初步估算
example_sentence: 先估算个大概预算，再决定分期怎么做。
example_sentence_en: Estimate a rough budget first, then decide how to phase the work.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 把信息、信号或物资收进来。
搭配: 接收信号；接收数据；接收信息
example_sentence: 终端接收信号不稳时，先检查天线角度。
example_sentence_en: When the terminal receives an unstable signal, check the antenna angle first.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 把东西保存起来以备后用。
英文意义: to save and preserve, to store
搭配: 储藏粮食；低温储藏；长期储藏
example_sentence: 这些样本要低温储藏，不然活性会掉得很快。
example_sentence_en: These samples must be stored at low temperature, or their activity drops quickly.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。

mandarin_意义: 向外发出气味、能量或信息。
搭配: 散发热量；散发气味；散发魅力
example_sentence: 这种涂层在高温下不会散发刺鼻气味。
example_sentence_en: This coating does not give off a harsh smell at high temperatures.
usage_note: 口语和书面都能用，具体语气看上下文。
common_errors: 根据语境读音不同，注意区分“sàn/fā”。

mandarin_意义: 海水受引力影响形成的涨落现象。
搭配: 潮汐能；潮汐变化；涨落潮汐
example_sentence: 沿海电站在研究怎么把潮汐能接入本地电网。
example_sentence_en: Coastal power stations are studying how to connect tidal energy to the local grid.
usage_note: 多用于自然科学，也可引申描述周期波动。
common_errors: 常写作“潮汐能”，不是“潮夕能”。

mandarin_意义: 指经过比较后认为某人或某事物有价值，并愿意选择或采用。
英文意义: to take a fancy to, to prefer
example_sentence: 公司看中了他的管理能力，决定由他负责新事业部。
example_sentence_en: The company took a fancy to his management skills and decided to put him in charge of the new division.
usage_note: 多用于商业决策、招聘和投资语境，后面常接具体对象。

mandarin_意义: 指事件发生的社会、历史或行业条件。
example_sentence: 报道先交代了政策背景，再分析房租上涨的原因。
example_sentence_en: The report first explained the policy background, then analyzed the causes of rising rent.
usage_note: 新闻写作中常用于说明事实的前提条件。

mandarin_意义: 指某个国家或地区本身的、本地的。
example_sentence: 多家本土品牌通过联名营销扩大了年轻消费群体。
example_sentence_en: Several local brands expanded their young customer base through co-branding campaigns.
usage_note: 常与“国际”对比使用，突出本地属性。

mandarin_意义: 指围绕某一主题进行公开交流和讨论的会议或平台。
example_sentence: 在数字经济论坛上，专家讨论了跨境数据流动规则。
example_sentence_en: At the digital economy forum, experts discussed rules for cross-border data flows.
usage_note: 既可指线下会议，也可指线上讨论平台。

mandarin_意义: 指在一定时期内受到广泛关注的话题或事件。
英文意义: hot spot (refers to thing or place that attracts great attention)
example_sentence: 平台根据热点话题调整了首页推荐机制。
example_sentence_en: The platform adjusted its homepage recommendation mechanism based on trending topics.
usage_note: 常与“话题、事件、问题”搭配。

mandarin_意义: 指企业或机构中负责某一业务板块的高级管理人员。
example_sentence: 市场总监在发布会上公布了下季度品牌策略。
example_sentence_en: The marketing director announced the brand strategy for next quarter at the press conference.
usage_note: 职位名称，常见于公司组织架构。

mandarin_意义: 指把分散的资源、流程或信息统一协调起来，形成更高效率的整体。
example_sentence: 集团计划整合各地仓储资源，降低整体物流成本。
example_sentence_en: The group plans to integrate warehouse resources across regions to reduce overall logistics costs.
usage_note: 核心含义是“整合、统筹”，不是“顺从”或“符合”。

mandarin_意义: 指系统、机构或项目按照一定机制运行并开展工作。
英文意义: (of organizations, institutions, etc.) to work in progress, to carry out activities
example_sentence: 新基金正式运作后，首月就完成了三项投资。
example_sentence_en: After the new fund began operating, it completed three investments in the first month.
usage_note: 可作动词，也常见于名词性表达“运作机制”。

mandarin_意义: 指为解决问题或实现目标而制定的具体计划。
example_sentence: 项目组提交了三套降本方案供董事会评估。
example_sentence_en: The project team submitted three cost-reduction plans for board evaluation.
usage_note: 强调可执行性和步骤安排。

mandarin_意义: 指因信息不足或情况复杂而感到不解。
example_sentence: 新规发布初期，部分中小企业对申报流程感到困惑。
example_sentence_en: In the early stage of the new regulation, some SMEs felt confused about the filing process.
usage_note: 常作名词或形容词，表达认知上的不确定。

mandarin_意义: 指使原有问题或矛盾变得更加严重。
example_sentence: 原材料涨价进一步加剧了制造企业的成本压力。
example_sentence_en: Rising raw material prices further intensified cost pressure on manufacturers.
usage_note: 多用于负面趋势，宾语常是“矛盾、风险、压力”。

mandarin_意义: 指公司或机构中的最高行政负责人之一。
英文意义: (of political party, bank, etc.) chairman, president
example_sentence: 集团总裁在财报会上回应了海外业务亏损问题。
example_sentence_en: The group president responded to overseas business losses at the earnings briefing.
usage_note: 企业职位称谓，语体较正式。

mandarin_意义: 指在产品、业务或结构上增加不同类型，形成更丰富的组合。
example_sentence: 该企业通过业务多元化分散了单一市场的风险。
example_sentence_en: The company reduced single-market risk through business diversification.
usage_note: 核心含义是“多样化、分散化”，不是“相乘”。

mandarin_意义: 指学校、机构或企业按条件录取并接纳人员。
英文意义: to recruit, to take in (students, employees, etc.)
example_sentence: 公司今年计划招收一百名应届毕业生进入管培项目。
example_sentence_en: The company plans to recruit 100 fresh graduates into its management trainee program this year.
usage_note: 常用于教育和人力资源场景。

mandarin_意义: 指在单位中受雇并从事工作的人员。
example_sentence: 企业通过员工培训提升了门店服务质量。
example_sentence_en: The company improved store service quality through employee training.
usage_note: 中性职业称谓，适用范围广。

mandarin_意义: 指为共同目标协同工作的组织化群体。
example_sentence: 跨部门团队用了两周完成新系统上线测试。
example_sentence_en: A cross-functional team completed launch testing for the new system in two weeks.
usage_note: 强调分工协作与共同目标。

mandarin_意义: 指某一环境中形成的整体气氛和感受。
example_sentence: 公开透明的沟通机制改善了部门合作氛围。
example_sentence_en: A transparent communication mechanism improved the department’s collaborative atmosphere.
usage_note: 读音是 fēnwéi，常用于组织文化和社会环境描述。

mandarin_意义: 指诚实守信、言行一致的品格和经营原则。
example_sentence: 监管部门强调平台经济要把诚信经营放在首位。
example_sentence_en: Regulators emphasized that platform businesses must put honest operations first.
usage_note: 常用于商业伦理、信用体系和个人品德。

mandarin_意义: 指为人公正坦率，不徇私、不曲从。
example_sentence: 董事会在声明中肯定了审计负责人一贯正直的职业操守。
example_sentence_en: In its statement, the board recognized the auditor’s consistently upright professional ethics.
usage_note: 多用于评价人格与职业操守。

mandarin_意义: 指不同个人或部门相互配合，共同完成任务。
英文意义: to cooperate, to work in coordination with
example_sentence: 平台改版依赖产品、技术和运营三方协作推进。
example_sentence_en: The platform revamp depended on collaboration among product, engineering, and operations.
usage_note: 强调分工基础上的配合。

mandarin_意义: 指不利的、消极的影响或评价。
example_sentence: 公司及时回应争议，避免了负面舆情持续扩散。
example_sentence_en: The company responded quickly to the controversy, preventing prolonged spread of negative public opinion.
usage_note: 常见于媒体报道和风险管理语境。

mandarin_意义: 指把事物发展到某个阶段或方向。
英文意义: to push in a certain direction
example_sentence: 新政策把绿色金融实践推向了更高标准。
example_sentence_en: The new policy pushed green finance practices to a higher standard.
usage_note: 后面常接“新阶段、高潮、国际市场”等结果方向。

mandarin_意义: 指企业、机构所经营或处理的具体工作事项。
example_sentence: 该公司海外业务连续三个季度保持增长。
example_sentence_en: The company’s overseas business has grown for three consecutive quarters.
usage_note: 可指工作内容，也可指经营板块。

mandarin_意义: 指整体流程中的某一部分或步骤。
example_sentence: 审计发现采购环节仍存在流程重复问题。
example_sentence_en: The audit found that the procurement stage still has repetitive process issues.
usage_note: 常用于流程管理和质量控制。

mandarin_意义: 指制定政策或行动时最初依据的原则和目标。
example_sentence: 这项改革的出发点是降低中小企业的融资成本。
example_sentence_en: The starting point of this reform is to lower financing costs for SMEs.
usage_note: 常见于政策解读和立场说明。

mandarin_意义: 指按照规则把资源、任务或利益划分给不同对象。
example_sentence: 管理层决定按项目优先级重新分配年度预算。
example_sentence_en: Management decided to reallocate the annual budget based on project priorities.
usage_note: 强调依据与公平性。

mandarin_意义: 指受聘提供专业意见和决策建议的人。
example_sentence: 公司聘请外部顾问评估海外并购风险。
example_sentence_en: The company hired an external consultant to assess risks in overseas acquisitions.
usage_note: 通常不直接执行事务，重在提供建议。

mandarin_意义: 表示有利于某事进行，使用起来更方便。
英文意义: to be easy to, to be convenient for
example_sentence: 平台统一数据口径，便于监管部门实时比对。
example_sentence_en: The platform unified data standards, making real-time comparison easier for regulators.
usage_note: 后面常接动词短语，表示“有利于……”。

mandarin_意义: 指从主体延伸出来的部分，也可指机构下设单位。
example_sentence: 总部要求各区域分支同步执行新的合规流程。
example_sentence_en: Headquarters required all regional branches to implement the new compliance process simultaneously.
usage_note: 在组织管理和技术语境中都常见。

mandarin_意义: 指明知存在风险仍采取行动。
英文意义: to take a risk, to take chances
example_sentence: 在现金流紧张时盲目扩张无异于冒险经营。
example_sentence_en: Expanding blindly during cash-flow stress is essentially risky management.
usage_note: 多带有警示色彩。

mandarin_意义: 指对个人或组织的能力、业绩进行评估。
example_sentence: 新绩效制度把服务质量纳入考核指标。
example_sentence_en: The new performance system incorporates service quality into evaluation metrics.
usage_note: 常见于教育、人事和管理场景。

mandarin_意义: 指词语、行为或现象所表达的意义。
example_sentence: 专家解释了“数据主权”在国际规则中的实际含义。
example_sentence_en: Experts explained the practical meaning of “data sovereignty” in international rules.
usage_note: 可用于语言解释，也可用于政策解读。

mandarin_意义: 指指导行为和决策的核心观念。
example_sentence: 该企业将可持续发展理念写入年度战略。
example_sentence_en: The company incorporated sustainable development principles into its annual strategy.
usage_note: 抽象程度较高，常见于政策和管理文本。

mandarin_意义: 指对未来理想状态的向往与追求。
example_sentence: 纪录片讲述了年轻创业者把职业梦想变成产品的过程。
example_sentence_en: The documentary tells how young entrepreneurs turned career dreams into products.
usage_note: 语体可庄重也可口语，常带积极色彩。

mandarin_意义: 指单位或政府向成员提供的待遇与保障。
英文意义: welfare, life benefits (housing, medical affairs, food, transportation, cultural entertainment etc.)
example_sentence: 新政策明确提高一线员工的住房福利标准。
example_sentence_en: The new policy explicitly raises housing benefit standards for frontline employees.
usage_note: 常见于劳动保障和人力资源话题。

mandarin_意义: 指用于计算或比较的基础数量。
example_sentence: 由于用户基数扩大，平台广告收入同比增长明显。
example_sentence_en: Because the user base expanded, the platform’s ad revenue grew significantly year over year.
usage_note: 统计、金融和政策分析中高频使用。

mandarin_意义: 指证明公民身份的法定证件。
example_sentence: 办理业务前，系统会先核验申请人的身份证信息。
example_sentence_en: Before processing the case, the system first verifies the applicant’s ID card information.
usage_note: 常与“登记、核验、挂失”搭配。

mandarin_意义: 指原证件到期或失效后重新发放新的证件。
example_sentence: 公安部门启动了居民身份证集中换发工作。
example_sentence_en: Public security authorities launched a centralized ID card reissuance program.
usage_note: 多见于政务、公文和新闻报道。

mandarin_意义: 指公安机关在基层设立的治安管理机构。
example_sentence: 市民可在就近派出所办理身份证信息变更。
example_sentence_en: Residents can update ID information at the nearest local police station.
usage_note: 常与户政、治安、社区服务场景相关。

mandarin_意义: 指字词或表达不常见，公众熟悉度较低。
example_sentence: 为方便办事群众，系统把生僻字输入流程做了优化。
example_sentence_en: To help citizens, the system optimized input procedures for rare characters.
usage_note: 多用于文字、术语和表达方式。

mandarin_意义: 指把信息、数据或信号送入系统。
example_sentence: 用户输入身份证号码后，系统会自动校验格式。
example_sentence_en: After users enter their ID number, the system automatically validates the format.
usage_note: 可用于信息技术和日常业务办理。

mandarin_意义: 指暂时放下，不再继续处理某项事务。
example_sentence: 由于预算不足，该扩建计划被董事会暂时搁置。
example_sentence_en: Due to insufficient budget, the expansion plan was temporarily shelved by the board.
usage_note: 常带有“延后处理”的含义。

mandarin_意义: 指按程序处理事务并完成相关手续。
example_sentence: 新平台上线后，企业开户可全程线上办理。
example_sentence_en: After the new platform launched, corporate account opening can be handled fully online.
usage_note: 政务和服务行业的高频动词。

mandarin_意义: 指处境不自然、难以应对或令人难堪。
example_sentence: 系统临时宕机让发布会现场一度十分尴尬。
example_sentence_en: A temporary system outage made the press event quite awkward for a while.
usage_note: 可形容情境，也可形容关系状态。

mandarin_意义: 指通过正式渠道得知消息，多用于书面报道。
英文意义: to be informed (of a news, or an event)
example_sentence: 记者从监管部门获悉，新规将于下月正式实施。
example_sentence_en: Reporters learned from regulators that the new rule will take effect next month.
usage_note: 新闻语体较强，常见于报道句首。

mandarin_意义: 指运行在计算机或移动设备上的程序与系统。
example_sentence: 该公司通过升级软件系统缩短了订单处理时间。
example_sentence_en: The company shortened order processing time by upgrading its software system.
usage_note: 可泛指应用程序，也可指完整系统。

mandarin_意义: 表示“准会、一定会”，用于强调结果可靠。
example_sentence: 把流程按这份清单走一遍，保准不会漏项。
example_sentence_en: Follow this checklist once, and you’re guaranteed not to miss any item.
usage_note: 口语色彩较强，常用于承诺或保证。

mandarin_意义: 指某种行为或现象在单位时间内发生的次数。
example_sentence: 用户活跃频率上升，说明改版提升了留存效果。
example_sentence_en: An increase in user activity frequency indicates improved retention after the revamp.
usage_note: 可用于技术、市场和行为分析。

mandarin_意义: 指组织或机构正式建立；也可指论点在逻辑上站得住。
英文意义: (of organizations, institutions, etc.) to found; to formally establish
example_sentence: 公司宣布成立数据合规委员会，加强内部审查。
example_sentence_en: The company announced the establishment of a data compliance committee to strengthen internal review.
usage_note: 注意区分“机构成立”和“观点成立”两种用法。

mandarin_意义: 指纪念国家成立的重要节日。
example_sentence: 国庆期间，多地文旅消费数据创下新高。
example_sentence_en: During National Day, cultural and tourism consumption data hit new highs in many regions.
usage_note: 多用于节假日报道和公共活动信息。

mandarin_意义: 指在较大范围内普遍适用或共同使用。
example_sentence: 行业协会发布了数据交换通用标准。
example_sentence_en: The industry association released a universal standard for data exchange.
usage_note: 可作动词也可作形容词，常见于技术和制度语境。

mandarin_意义: 指范围延伸到某区域、群体或业务领域。
example_sentence: 新网络建设计划将在两年内覆盖全部县域医院。
example_sentence_en: The new network rollout plan will cover all county-level hospitals within two years.
usage_note: 既可用于空间范围，也可用于业务范围。

mandarin_意义: 指数量、价格或指标持续向上增长。
example_sentence: 受需求拉动，新能源装机数据持续攀升。
example_sentence_en: Driven by demand, new-energy installation figures kept climbing.
usage_note: 多用于客观指标上升，语体较正式。

mandarin_意义: 表示根据已知情况可以推断结果，不言自明。
example_sentence: 原料价格连续上涨，企业利润承压可想而知。
example_sentence_en: With raw material prices rising continuously, the pressure on corporate profits is easy to imagine.
usage_note: 多用于总结判断，后接推断结果。

mandarin_意义: 指国家，多用于书面表达或文学语体。
example_sentence: 报道比较了不同国度在数字税政策上的取向差异。
example_sentence_en: The report compared policy differences on digital tax among various nations.
usage_note: 语体较书面，日常口语常用“国家”。

mandarin_意义: 指通过主动措施防止不希望的结果发生。
example_sentence: 企业通过分级授权机制避免了数据误删风险。
example_sentence_en: The company avoided accidental data deletion risk through tiered authorization.
usage_note: 后面常接负面结果或风险。

mandarin_意义: 指把物体挂在高处或固定位置。
example_sentence: 展馆入口悬挂了多语种指引牌，方便外宾通行。
example_sentence_en: Multilingual signs were hung at the exhibition entrance to assist foreign visitors.
usage_note: 多用于可见物体的布置与展示。

mandarin_意义: 指光线普遍照到各处，常用于书面或比喻表达。
example_sentence: 政策红利尚未普照所有中小企业，区域差异仍然明显。
example_sentence_en: Policy dividends have not yet reached all SMEs evenly, and regional gaps remain clear.
usage_note: 本义偏文学，现代报道中多用于比喻。

mandarin_意义: 指信息、观点或内容在群体中扩散和传递。
example_sentence: 媒体平台应提高审核效率，防止失实信息快速传播。
example_sentence_en: Media platforms should improve review efficiency to prevent rapid spread of false information.
usage_note: 可用于中性信息，也可用于风险内容。

mandarin_意义: 不重要。
example_sentence: 只要大方向是对的，这些细节都无关紧要。
example_sentence_en: As long as the general direction is right, these details are immaterial.
usage_note: Not vital.

mandarin_意义: 指把某事项放进既定范围、体系或计划中统一管理。
example_sentence: 地方政府将灵活就业人群纳入社会保障体系。
example_sentence_en: Local governments included flexible workers in the social security system.
usage_note: 后面常接制度、计划、范围等名词。

mandarin_意义: 指不当或过度使用权力、资源或工具。
example_sentence: 平台若滥用用户数据，将面临高额行政处罚。
example_sentence_en: If a platform misuses user data, it will face heavy administrative penalties.
usage_note: 明显贬义，常见于法律与监管语境。

mandarin_意义: 指因某种原因拖延时间，影响原定进度。
example_sentence: 审批环节反复补件，耽误了项目落地时间。
example_sentence_en: Repeated supplementary documents in approval delayed the project launch timeline.
usage_note: 多用于时间损失和效率下降场景。

mandarin_意义: 口语中指遭遇不顺或坏运气。
example_sentence: 供应链断裂那周，几家小店都觉得自己特别倒霉。
example_sentence_en: During the week of supply-chain disruption, several small shops felt especially unlucky.
usage_note: 口语词，正式报告中建议改用“不利”或“受挫”。

mandarin_意义: 指执法部门对嫌疑人实施追缉并控制。
example_sentence: 警方通报称，跨省联合抓捕行动已成功收网。
example_sentence_en: Police reported that the cross-provincial joint arrest operation had been successfully completed.
usage_note: 常见于法治新闻和警方通报。

mandarin_意义: 指实施违反法律规定的行为。
example_sentence: 企业培训明确强调，篡改数据属于犯法行为。
example_sentence_en: Company training clearly emphasized that tampering with data is illegal.
usage_note: 语气较口语，正式文本常用“违法”。

mandarin_意义: 指司法或公安机关公开发布追捕令，缉拿在逃人员。
英文意义: to issue a warrant for arrest
example_sentence: 警方已对该案主犯发布通缉令并公开线索征集。
example_sentence_en: Police have issued a wanted notice for the principal suspect and opened public tip collection.
usage_note: 法律语体明显，通常与“令”连用。

mandarin_意义: 指实施犯罪行为并依法应受处罚的人。
example_sentence: 新闻通报提醒公众提高警惕，协助识别在逃罪犯。
example_sentence_en: The public notice reminded citizens to stay alert and help identify wanted criminals.
usage_note: 法律与新闻语境高频词。
